caption: A man with light skin, short brown hair, and a smile is pictured in a professional headshot, wearing a black suit jacket, white shirt, and striped tie. He is positioned on the right side of the screen against a background featuring blurred stock market candle charts. On the left side of the screen, a blue banner contains the name "Basil Chapman" and the text "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022". As the sequence progresses, white text appears in the center of the screen. First, it displays "45+ YEARS EXPERIENCE". In the next frame, this text is replaced by "LARRY WILL PROVIDE" followed by "DAILY CHARTS" with a small arrow pointing right. Finally, the text expands to include "LARRY WILL PROVIDE", "DAILY CHARTS", "VIDEOS", and "DATA ON THE KEY MARKETS", with small arrows pointing toward the man's portrait.
